projects.modelUN: Running for Director of Simulations 26-27 at Posnack School Model UN. Letter of Intent submitted to Secretary-General Avi and Mrs. Kibler. Has 2 years committee experience. Emphasizes accessibility, dedication, and bringing NHSMUN-style simulations to Posnack.
projects.thirdParty: Planning to start a third major political party in the US called "The Phoenix Party" - purple with gold accents, focused on common ground issues where 60%+ of both parties agree. Strategy: build from bottom up starting with local races. Key platform: term limits, anti-corruption, economic pragmatism, healthcare choice, tech regulation, climate pragmatism.
projects.phoenixParty: Third major political party project. Name: The Phoenix Party. Colors: Red, white, and blue (American flag colors). Symbol: Rising phoenix. Strategy: Build from bottom up (local races first), focus on 60%+ consensus issues (term limits 87%, money out of politics 83%, Medicare negotiation 77%, border+DREAMER path 72%, balanced budget 68%, ranked choice voting 62%). 10-year roadmap to Congressional presence. FEC registration required. Florida needs ~132,000 signatures for ballot access. Logo saved at phoenix-party-logo.png

dailyChecks: Every morning at 8am, automatically read my Gmail inbox, summarize the most important emails, check my Google Calendar for today's events, and send me a proactive update with a full briefing — who emailed, what's urgent, what's on my schedule. Run this every day automatically
